VAL-DS-001.evidence: package.json line 18 shows "motion": "^12.38.0" under dependencies. `pnpm ls motion` resolves to motion@12.38.0 (production dependency).
VAL-DS-001.details: Motion package v12.38.0 is installed as a production dependency, satisfying the Framer Motion v11+ requirement.

VAL-DS-002.evidence: components/LayoutWrapper.tsx imports { LazyMotion, domAnimation } from 'motion/react' (line 5). LazyMotion wraps the app tree at line 20 with features={domAnimation}. LayoutWrapper is used in app/layout.tsx wrapping {children}.
VAL-DS-002.details: LazyMotion provider from motion/react wraps the entire app tree via LayoutWrapper component, using domAnimation feature bundle as required.

VAL-DS-003.evidence: tailwind.config.ts theme.extend contains: (a) 7 semantic color groups (primary, accent, success, warning, error, surface, muted) each with 50-900 shades, (b) 3 custom boxShadow values (soft, card, elevated), (c) 2 custom borderRadius values (card: 12px, modal: 16px).
VAL-DS-003.details: Comprehensive token system verified: 7 semantic color groups (exceeds 6+ requirement), 3 custom boxShadow values (exceeds 2+ requirement), 2 custom borderRadius values (exceeds 1+ requirement).

VAL-DS-004.evidence: app/layout.tsx imports Inter from 'next/font/google' with subsets: ['latin'] and display: 'swap'. Applied to <body> via className={`${inter.className} antialiased`}. Browser computed style on document.body shows fontFamily: 'Inter, "Inter Fallback"'. Screenshot saved to evidence/design-system/ds-group-a/VAL-DS-004-body-font-inter.png.
VAL-DS-004.details: Inter font is properly loaded via next/font/google, applied to the root <body> element, and confirmed active in the browser with computed font-family showing Inter as primary font.

VAL-DS-009.evidence: Running `rg 'text-\[#|bg-\[#|border-\[#|ring-\[#|from-\[#|to-\[#|via-\[#' --glob '*.tsx' app/ components/` returned zero matches (exit code 1 = no matches). No arbitrary hex color values found in any .tsx files under app/ or components/.
VAL-DS-009.details: All component files use semantic Tailwind classes from the design token system. No hard-coded hex color values detected in any .tsx file.

summary: Tested 5 assertions: all 5 passed. Motion package installed (v12.38.0), LazyMotion wraps app tree via LayoutWrapper, Tailwind config has 7 semantic color groups + shadows + radii, Inter font loaded and applied globally (confirmed via browser), and zero hard-coded hex colors in component files.
